textLayer.title: Text layer
textLayer.hint: Local extraction; no data leaves your device.
textLayer.shaMismatch: The selected file does not match the original (different sha256).
evidenceAI.title: Evidence Assistant
evidenceAI.proposeLocalError: Could not propose Evidence with the local model.
evidenceAI.invalidHint: Text not present in the document (model proposal discarded).
evidenceAI.consentTitle: Send the text to the local model?
evidenceAI.consentBody: This source's text will be sent to the local Ollama model on your device. It will not be sent to the cloud. Continue?
evidenceAI.truncated: Partial analysis: the document is too long, only the first {{chars}} characters were analyzed.
evidenceAI.empty: No text available: extract the source text first.
evidenceAI.disclaimer: Automatic, unverified proposals; not a legal opinion. Nothing is saved without your confirmation.
evidenceAI.unsavedHint: Unsaved proposals: approve, edit or discard.
evidenceAI.acceptError: Text not present in the source: cannot create the Excerpt.
citationAI.title: Candidate citations
citationAI.empty: No excerpt without a citation to propose.
citationAI.disclaimer: Automatic, unverified proposals; not a legal opinion. Nothing is saved without your confirmation.
citationAI.unsavedHint: Unsaved proposals: approve, edit or discard.
citationAI.acceptError: Could not create the Citation (invalid excerpt).
export.hint: Exports all the case's Citations, Excerpts and Sources.
chat.disclaimer: Exploratory chat: answers are unverified, carry no citations and are not legal advice.
chat.empty: Start an exploratory conversation about this matter.
matter.label: Matter
settings.label: Settings
conversation.grounded: Conversation grounded in {{count}} sources of this matter.
draft.title: Comparsa di costituzione e risposta
draft.body1: On behalf of Alfa S.r.l., in the person of its legal representative pro tempore, we enter an appearance in the proceedings brought by the counterparty and contest the opposing claim in full.
draft.body2: Clause 7.2 of the supply contract allows withdrawal by the Supplier alone with fifteen days' notice, in conflict with the principle of good faith in contract performance.
draft.body3: We therefore request dismissal of the claimant's demand and, by way of counterclaim, a finding of breach under art. 1453 of the Civil Code.
draft.warning: This draft requires the lawyer's validation before becoming a document.
verify.empty: Open a matter to verify the citation chain.
verify.code.OrphanExcerpt: Excerpt not cited by any Affermazione.
verify.code.UnpinnedDocumentExcerpt: Excerpt not pinned to a document version (weaker Evidence).
verify.code.UncitedSource: Source with no excerpts (not yet used).
genealogy.normSubtitle: Tracks versions, amendments, repeals and links of a norm over time.
genealogy.alert1: Warning: check the normative version applicable at the date of the facts.
genealogy.alert2: The norm may have had a different text at the time of the contract.

workflow.card.load.body: Add the document to start from.
